text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the shopping district with Kawakami
Princess.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urgh... a raffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me, I'm sure we got a raffle ticket
while shopping earlier.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Ohh... My old memories are coming back!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I remember trying really hard to get the first-prize
Princess Fighter phone, but all I ended up with
was a mountain of tissue packets!
choice_data_list:
Let's help you forget that bad memory by
getting a better result this time around!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Urk... But the more you desire something, the
more you're likely to draw a dud...
choice_data_list:
It'll be fine. Besides, there's no Princess Fighter
phone this time.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...That's a good point.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All right. Today's the day I'm going to win
something other than tissues! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess and I turn the lever on
the raffle tumbler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Did you see that, Trainer?! I won the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess leaps around happily. Now if I
let her have the prize all to herself, she'll have her
perfect happy memo—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is great! Now we can go on a hot spring
vacation together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...?
You don't want to?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We won this prize through the power of our bond,
Trainer! It's only right that we should both enjoy
it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hot springs! ♪ Hot springs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave Kawakami Princess to her dance of joy and
look at our schedule. If we're going together, I'll
need to find a time when we both have the day
off.
choice_data_list:
We won't be able to go for a while yet. Is that
okay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Not a problem! Hot springs! ♪ Hot springs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is overjoyed at the prospect
of visiting the hot springs. She had been looking
oddly strained recently, so it's nice to see her
smiling again.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: First prize!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So it was all true... Victory truly does come to
those who are free from desire!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Here's your prize—a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking about trying to draw from the raffle
one more time, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've seen this scrumptious hamburger
steak, I'm not sure I'll be able to suppress my
desire a second time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hwaaah... I'm starting to drool... T-Trainer, I don't
suppose you mind if I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand over the prize to Kawakami Princess, who's
become thoroughly spellbound by the tasty
delicacy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my, the second prize?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: L-look at all those carrots crammed into the box!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's a heck of a lot better than tissues! I'd say
this counts as a victory, right?!
choice_data_list:
Think you'll feel different about raffles from
here on?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, definitely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An overjoyed Kawakami Princess and I share the
bountiful supply of carrots between ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thaaat's... good enough! I'll take anything as long
as it's not another pack of tissues.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Eheh, just leave this kind of thing to me. I'm
growing each and every day!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Little by little, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having avoided the dreaded tissues, Kawakami
Princess seems in slightly higher spirits.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh! I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No, it's not your fault, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's all because of my greedy princess right hand!
Curse this right hand of mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to cheer up a thoroughly downcast
Kawakami Princess.
